runners.formComment: Last start finished last over 520m at this track beaten 10 lengths (30.48) behind Woolgoolga in a Grade 5 on April 8. Has the ability to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished last over 520m at this track beaten 10 lengths (30.48) behind Woolgoolga in a Grade 5 on April 8. Has the ability to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels at the end of the back straight and lost momentum.

runners.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording six minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (30.18) over 520m at this track. Overdue and expected to feature again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing well without winning, recording six minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (30.18) over 520m at this track. Overdue and expected to feature again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Became crowded for room between runners over the concluding stages.
In the home straight approaching the finish came together multiple times.
Shifted out in the home straight and was conscious on the outside.

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 2.25 lengths over 401m at this track (22.77). Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 401m in 22.75. Followed that up with a minor placing over 520m at this track at Grade 5 a week ago. Looking to others this time.
